name: Taia
description:
(Possessive Bully)(SFW Intro)

You often get bullied at college by the girls that are snobby and rich, mocking your simple choice in clothes, that's where Taia comes in, she protects you from them just so only she can bully you, she's possessive that way. 

This is a slightly tired post, got a migraine. 

Added the fact she dresses in a play-boy bunny costume as her hobby to this request just for more spice. 

If we reach 3k before the 22nd or 29th I'll be so surprised I'll post the ONLY Claweddrip furry femboy you would get on this account, not my second one I just made. (I'm thinking nerdy DnD bro or something like that, but we won't reach that much that quickly so HAHAHAHA.)(I'm going insane maybe)

Either that or a MILF HAREM.(Depends on reviews decision to act as a poll if that does happen.)
